hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && grep -qn '—' "$f" 2>/dev/null; then lines=$(grep -n '—' "$f" | head -5); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"EMDASH DETECTED. Fix these lines (no emdashes ever):\n${lines}\"}}"; else true; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ]; then ext="${f##*.}"; case "$ext" in py) cd "$(dirname "$f")" && ruff check --select E,F,W "$f" 2>&1 | head -20 | { output=$(cat); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"RUFF ISSUES:\n${output}\"}}"; fi; } ;; ts|tsx|js|jsx) cd "$(dirname "$f")" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty "$f" 2>&1 | head -20 | { output=$(cat); if [ -n "$output" ] && echo "$output" | grep -q 'error TS'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"TSC ERRORS:\n${output}\"}}"; fi; } ;; esac; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ]; then case "$f" in */src/*) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Reminder: You modified $f. If this changes behaviour, API, or architecture -- consider updating the relevant spec doc or CLAUDE.md so future sessions aren't blind to this change."}}" ;; esac; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_response.stderr // empty' | { read -r err; if [ -n "$err" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Reminder: That command had errors. Diagnose the root cause before retrying. Consider whether this failure should be recorded as a factory_learning or Neo4j node.\"}}"; fi; }
